game.title: A Perfect Landing
game.short_text: Land a spacecraft on different planets

details.title: A Perfect Landing
details.description:
Land a spacecraft on a wide variety of procedurally generated 2D planets. Leave orbit, enter the atmosphere and gracefully glide to your landing spot. Economize your fuel, avoid overheating and do NOT stall your wing. Gravitation, heating, air resistance, lift, pressure and more are modelled in accordance with physical reality.
This game was created in 10 days for the Beginner Circle Jam #3. 
Who we are:Graphic Design: Hermann "optimaList" SeitzProgramming and Sound: Julian "DaJu" Wenzel
special thanks to Nina and Toni for testing the game!

details.title: Little Cosmonaut
details.description:
GAMEJAM EDITION
Little Cosmonaut is an action roguelike game made in two weeks for the Beginners Circle Jam #3! The theme of the jam was "A different Planet"
You take the role of a little explorer who is exploring different planets and gathering resources while he is listening to his favorite music.
There is limited content at this stage of the game and it's more like a demo. But i would love to explore this project a little bit more beyond the game jam ^^ any feedback would be helpful!

Controls
Move  : WASD
Shoot : Left Mouse Button or Shift
Dash : Right Mouse Button or Space

Music by  https://www.tandess.com/en/music

game.title: Asteroid Alien
game.short_text: Jump through space in this endless runner!

details.title: Asteroid Alien
details.description:
You are an cute little alien who has set out on a journey to see more of the universe. Travel as far as you can and try to beat your high score while avoiding dangers along the way.
Asteroid Alien is an endless procedurally generated runner where you have to jump from asteroid to asteroid through space and survive as long as possible! This game starts easy but the further you go, the harder it gets.
Controls:
Use Arrow Keys or W, A, D to moveYou can also use Space to jump
The Team:
Design: RMD Kurnya || Dyrolvaid || TigerSkyDev
Programming: Sense_101
Art: RMD Kurnya (a.k.a SummerOrigins)
Music: Raphael Batot

If you enjoy the game be sure to leave a review or a comment below, this will really help us out :-D. 
Enjoy!
by the way my highscore is over 2000 :-D.

game.title: Pure Heart
game.short_text: Explore another planet, fight aliens, and solve puzzles in this short action RPG about Yuki, the chosen savior of Earth.

details.title: Pure Heart
details.description:
✦ DESCRIPTION ✦Yuki is an average girl who's chosen to prevent an invasion on Earth from an alien race known as the Lementians. Explore and learn about the planet of Lement as you progress. Fight intense battles and solve puzzles to defeat the corrupt King in this short action RPG.
Around 45 minutes to 1 hour of gameplayUnique battle system that requires you to constantly dodge attacks and figure out a strategy to defeat your enemySmall puzzles to advance to the next map, with one large dungeon that utilizes the techniques you learnedOptional cutscenes that expands the story, with an optional boss battle if you watch them all
This was a solo project made in less than 2 weeks and won 1st place for the Beginners Circle Jam.

✦ CONTROLS ✦
⬅️⬇️⬆️➡️Menu Navigation, MovementZAction Key, Normal AttackXCancel Key, Hold to Run, Magic AttackShiftLock Direction, Phase ShiftF4Toggle FullscreenF5Settings

game.title: WANDERER
game.short_text: A bite-sized card battler where you punch aliens in the face with your mecha-fist!

details.title: WANDERER
details.description:
Welcome to the future! You are the pilot of the WANDERER, humanity’s last hope to find a habitable planet in the far reaches of the known universe.
Discover ancient technology, meet strange aliens AND PUNCH THEM IN THE FACE! Because nothing will stop you in your mission to colonize this bountiful exotic new world.
  
What are you waiting for PILOT? Strap in and blast off into this brand new mecha-powered space adventure by MONSTERS MUST DIE!
  
WANDERER is a bite-sized card battler made for the Beginners Circle Jam #3. If you enjoyed it, sharing is caring! And if you want to drop a comment or feedback, go right ahead!
Rocket-Punch your way to the top!
Game Design and Art - monstersmustdie.itch.ioProgramming - n3buluz.itch.ioCover Art - veriaguimet.itch.io

details.title: Outrun The Sun
details.description:
Hope is not Lost !
The distant galaxy NS-384.  For millions of years it was an eight planet galaxy, much like our own. But its time has come.  Their mother star, Raus, is dying, and the life it once giveth it now so violently taketh away.  
All but one planet, the distant crystalline world of Vaitus, have been swallowed up by the swelling red giant, and it won't be long now before all traces of these worlds are wiped from galactic memory. 
Fortunately there is hope! You have been sent to Vaitus on a rescue mission for survivors and supplies.  You must try to save everyone you can and escape the planet. However, there's not much time. 
You must outrun the sun.

The Team
Artists: https://tantedante.itch.io/  |  https://dgplasm.itch.io/
Programmers: https://ashkman.itch.io/  |  https://john-ng.itch.io/
Sound Designers: https://gersorbo.itch.io/  |  https://amerrittaudio.itch.io/
Musician: https://itch.io/profile/thetkpizza
Rock and crystal models from low poly ultimate pack

Want to save your progress?  Smoother Gameplay? Play offline?
Simply scroll down and hit download, then follow the instructions.  Easy Install and Uninstall !  (currently only Windows)

IMPORTANT:
* Menu blurry or broken? Please refresh the page *

* Having issues or lag?  Please consider using another browser or downloading the PC version. Chrome seems to be causing many issues for people *
* We apologize if sounds in browser sound broken, we currently cannot find a fix for this, however all sounds on PC version work fine *

* Laptop users: No mouse? Use the Arrow Keys to Move and rotate *

details.title: BeatGunner
details.description:
A Beat saber/Space pirate trainer style Virtual reality game. An Arcade FPS in VR, Pick up your blasters and shoot those colored cubes.
Optimised to run on Oculus, HTC vive and Mixed reality devices.By making this project i learnt a lot, since i made this game for VR it should be optimised for performance. So i tried number of ways to reduce lag.First, For increasing the performance, i dint use colliders or rigidbodies in bullet prefab. Instead i used raycast inside each bullet. So each bullet will check if it hits any collider within a small distance from itself using raycast instead of collider to collider check. Then for instantiating game objects i used Object Polling technique. Since instantiating an gameobject during runtime increases cpu overhead which causes a lag spike. To tackle this problem, I simply spawned the object at the start of the scene and set it to inactive. Whenever i needed an object, i made it ready to use it, move the object to the spawn position and then set it to active. The "lag spike" will then just be part of the game loading the scene instead of interrupting gameplay. Open BeatGunner.exe and enjoy the game in your VR headset.

game.title: Astro Calm
game.short_text: Cultivate life by getting hit by the right asteroids!

details.title: Astro Calm
details.description:
Hello there!
Astro Calm is a mix between a simulation game, and a bullet hell. There is no lifebar - but there are still consequences. You play as a planet, and everytime you get hit, the elements on the surface of your planet changes!
Can you create a planet full of life? By the way - there is a win condition for this game (it doesn't communicate it very well). Get it by having a planet flourishing with life!

My little brother and I worked on this game together. This is the first official gamejam we've ever participated in! We're excited with what we've made, and would love to hear your feedback! If you liked the game, or noticed a bug, or have anything to say in general, feel free to leave a comment down below!

VERSIONS:
v0.3.0: Original upload for Beginner's Circle #3!
v0.3.2:  Final upload for Beginner's Circle (before updates were closed for judging) - Changes included Minor Bugfixes, & Fixed GUI scaling issues between different machines (hopefully)VERSIONS:
v0.3.0: Original upload for Beginner's Circle #3!
v0.3.2:  Minor Bugfixes, & Fixed GUI scaling issues between different machines (hopefully)

Unzip the file - and you should be good! The .exe file is within the folder, doubleclick that and the game will run! Specifically, you want to run "Astro Calm.exe"
Also - I know we don't have sound, sorry about that! Also the resolution had to be fixed due to menu issues - we didn't program our UI in well enough to support multiple resolutions! It's all a learning experience, eh?
